Measured outcomes and their sources

Northwind recorded 99.95% uptime during the audited quarter.

According to the 2026 Northwind adoption report, 12,480 customers activated a workspace.

Reviewers completed the workflow 2x faster per the controlled benchmark.

Rated 4.8/5 based on 2,341 verified responses. Read the methodology.

The audited category rank was #1. Source: Independent Category Audit, table 4

The protocol is clinically proven for the stated endpoint.
